---
title: "Exploratory Analysis"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, categories, description]
  include:
    categories: "eda"
---

Descriptive visualizations of the data. No formal hypothesis test, no p-value — these document patterns and guide interpretation. Figures are produced by the processing pipeline (`make mycobiome`, `make diet`, etc.).

Posts tagged **`eda`** appear here. Hypothesis tests tagged **`pre-specified`** appear under **Pre-specified Tests**.
